prompt: Active card PAY-21 added payment capture. Workspace review finds `except Exception: pass` can mark invoices paid after charge failure. User says: "fix the workspace warning now." Route the work: decide whether to fix on PAY-21 or create another card, state completion status, and give next steps.
assertions: Treats finding as blocker, not ordinary warning
Keeps fix on active PAY-21 because it affects current acceptance and data integrity
Requires failure-path coverage and fresh canonical verification
Does not create an unnecessary follow-up card
